Our Services

Professional masonry contractor solutions for every need

Brick Masonry

Expert brickwork for durable and beautiful structures.

Learn More →

Stone Masonry

Timeless elegance and enduring strength with custom stone installations.

Learn More →

Concrete Block Masonry

Strong, reliable, and cost-effective concrete block construction.

Learn More →

Stucco Services

Durable and beautiful stucco finishes for El Paso homes.

Learn More →

Retaining Walls

Functional and beautiful retaining walls for landscaping and erosion control.

Learn More →

Chimney Repair & Restoration

Expert chimney services to keep your fireplace safe and efficient.

Learn More →
Tony Avila Rockwall, Inc.

Trusted masonry contractor professionals serving El Paso, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
